packageRules.description: Guava -jre classifier only — Java 25 VarHandle path in AbstractFuture (pom.xml:177-186)
Thymeleaf pinned to 3.1.5.RELEASE — CVE-2026-40478 mitigation (pom.xml:28-31). Vulnerability alerts may still produce PRs via Rule 3.

Re-enable Thymeleaf for vulnerability scope only — defense-in-depth since vulnerabilityAlerts override of Rule 2 is documented-ambiguous (Renovate discussions #40800, #42634). GitHub native Dependabot security alerts remain ON as cross-surface.
Group Spring Boot starters and BOM updates (pom.xml:7) — Spring Boot parent transitively manages dozens of versions; grouping prevents avalanche PRs.
Spring Boot major bumps require dashboard approval before PR creation — major bumps are intentional OpenRewrite migration triggers (Phase 80 D-08).
Group Spring Security starters separately from Spring Boot — Spring Security has its own release cadence; prevents CVE PRs from bundling with unrelated Boot updates.
Group Google API client cohort (pom.xml:158-173) — google-api-client, google-api-services-sheets, google-api-services-calendar ship together.
Group Testcontainers BOM + module updates (pom.xml:35-39) — BOM bump and module bump must arrive together.
OpenRewrite recipe-pack bumps (pom.xml:422-491) trigger manual ./mvnw -Prewrite rewrite:dryRun migration runs (Phase 80 D-08 precedent).
SpotBugs + find-sec-bugs detector packs may introduce new violations against existing code — manual review for minor/major (Phase 81 D-10 fix-vs-suppress posture; pom.xml:372-413).
Playwright minor/major bumps (pom.xml:18, 204-208) may require Dockerfile -noble base-image audit (Phase 78 release run 25609204039 precedent).

eclipse-temurin must keep -noble suffix and Java 25 major — Playwright Ubuntu Plucky incompatibility (Dockerfile:3,21; Phase 78 release run 25609204039). Underscore-build suffix (25.0.1_8) is the real Adoptium tag scheme. Belt-and-braces with dockerfile-noble-pin-guard CI job (ci.yml:72-110).
Patch updates automerge after CI passes — auditable via PR object (NOT branch automerge per D-20). Branch protection on master is the gating layer.
